message:
feat(plan): Add rewrite module for Plan DAG transformations

New Rewrite Module (src/plan/rewrite.rs):
- Define RewritePolicy enum (Conservative, AssumeAssociativeComm)
- Define RewriteRule enum with DedupRaceJoin variant
- Add RewriteStep struct for tracking rewrite history
- Implement rewrite engine for plan DAG transformations
- Support deduplication of shared children across race-join patterns
- Configurable policy for associativity/commutativity assumptions

Plan DAG Module Updates (src/plan/mod.rs):
- Integration hooks for rewrite engine
- Additional analysis functions

This enables automatic optimization of concurrent execution plans through
semantics-preserving rewrites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
